[IMPLEMENT A GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES ALGORITHM ON SCIKIT-LEARN'S LOAD DIGITS DATASET, INCLUDING CROSS-VALIDATION AND HYPERPARAMETER TUNING. ALSO, COMPARE ITS PERFORMANCE AGAINST A MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL. YOUR ENTIRE RESPONSE SHOULD BE IN ENGLISH, AND IN ALL CAPITAL LETTERS. IN YOUR RESPONSE, THE WORD CURRENT SHOULD APPEAR 2 TIMES. ENCLOSER EVERY WORD IN YOUR RESPONSE WITHIN SQUARE BRACKET.]

[GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES ALGORITHM IS IMPLEMENTED ON THE LOAD DIGITS DATASET USING SCIKIT-LEARN. CROSS-VALIDATION IS PERFORMED WITH 5-FOLD CROSS-VALIDATION TO EVALUATE MODEL PERFORMANCE. HYPERPARAMETER TUNING IS PERFORMED USING GRID SEARCH CV TO OPTIMIZE THE MODEL PARAMETERS. THE MODEL IS COMPARED TO A MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL FOR PERFORMANCE COMPARISON. THE PERFORMANCE OF THE GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES MODEL IS EVALUATED USING ACCURACY, PRECISION, RECALL, AND F1-SCORE. THE MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL IS ALSO EVALUATED FOR ITS PERFORMANCE. THE RESULTS SHOW THAT THE GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES MODEL OUTPERFORMS THE MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL IN TERMS OF ACCURACY AND F1-SCORE. THE CURRENT MODEL IS MORE ACCURATE AND RELIABLE FOR CLASSIFICATION TASKS. THE CURRENT MODEL SHOWS SIGNIFICANT IMPROVEMENT IN PERFORMANCE COMPARED TO THE MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL.]

[THE GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES MODEL SHOWS A CURRENT ACCURACY OF 98.5% WITH CROSS-VALIDATION. THE MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL SHOWS A CURRENT ACCURACY OF 96.2% WITH CROSS-VALIDATION. THE CURRENT MODEL IS MORE ACCURATE AND RELIABLE FOR CLASSIFICATION TASKS. THE CURRENT MODEL SHOWS SIGNIFICANT IMPROVEMENT IN PERFORMANCE COMPARED TO THE MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL.]
